experiment_title: 二氧化碳对石蕊染色纸花颜色影响的实验

data.xdl_enriched:
<XDL>
  <Metadata title="二氧化碳对石蕊染色纸花颜色影响的实验" goal="探究二氧化碳气体对石蕊染色纸花颜色的影响及水分的作用" difficulty="Normal" />
  <Synthesis>
    <Hardware>
      <Component id="beaker_1" type="beaker" capacity="100mL" />
      <Component id="spray_bottle" type="sprayer" capacity="50mL" />
      <Component id="drying_rack" type="rack" />
      <Component id="paper_flower_1" type="paper_flower" />
      <Component id="paper_flower_2" type="paper_flower" />
      <Component id="paper_flower_3" type="paper_flower" />
      <Component id="gas_jar" type="gas_jar" capacity="500mL" />
      <Component id="glass_plate" type="glass_plate" />
      <Component id="stand_1" type="stand" />
    </Hardware>
    <Reagents>
      <Reagent name="litmus_solution" state="liquid" />
      <Reagent name="distilled_water" state="liquid" />
      <Reagent name="carbon_dioxide" state="gas" />
    </Reagents>
    <Procedure>
      
      <Add vessel="beaker_1" reagent="Litmus" volume="20 mL" id="step_0" />
      <Insert tool="paper_flower_1" vessel="beaker_1" id="step_1" />
      <Wait time="30s" id="step_2" />
      <Insert tool="paper_flower_2" vessel="beaker_1" id="step_3" />
      <Wait time="30s" id="step_4" />
      <Insert tool="paper_flower_3" vessel="beaker_1" id="step_5" />
      <Wait time="30s" id="step_6" />
      <Transfer from_vessel="beaker_1" to_vessel="drying_rack" volume="all" id="step_7" />
      <Wait time="10min" id="step_8" />
      
      <Attach vessel="gas_jar" support="stand_1" id="step_9" />
      <CollectGas source_vessel="beaker_1" collector="gas_jar" id="step_10" />
      <Insert tool="glass_plate" vessel="gas_jar" id="step_11" />
      <Wait time="30s" id="step_12" />
      
      <Insert tool="paper_flower_1" vessel="drying_rack" id="step_13" />
      <Add vessel="paper_flower_1" reagent="H2O" volume="2 mL" tool="spray_bottle" id="step_14" />
      <Wait time="30s" id="step_15" />
      
      <Insert tool="paper_flower_2" vessel="gas_jar" id="step_16" />
      <Wait time="1min" id="step_17" />
      
      <Add vessel="paper_flower_3" reagent="H2O" volume="2 mL" tool="spray_bottle" id="step_18" />
      <Insert tool="paper_flower_3" vessel="gas_jar" id="step_19" />
      <Wait time="1min" id="step_20" />
    </Procedure>
  </Synthesis>
</XDL>

graph_nodes.description: 用石蕊溶液依次染色三朵纸花，并晾干。
组装气体收集装置并收集二氧化碳气体，密封气体瓶。
将第一朵纸花取下并喷洒蒸馏水，观察颜色变化。
将第二朵纸花直接放入二氧化碳气体瓶中，观察颜色变化。
将第三朵纸花先喷洒蒸馏水，再放入二氧化碳气体瓶中，观察颜色变化。
